name: Waru Seadramon

signature_move.name: Darkstrom
signature_move.description: Engulfs the enemy in a whirlpool produced with the powers of darkness.

description: A Seadramon-species Digimon that evolved ‌in wickedness. It is able to control the powers of darkness with the blade-like horn on its head. Its personality has become even more sly, and its tenacity in chasing its prey exceeds that of Mega Seadramon . Its Special Move is engulfing the enemy in a whirlpool produced with the powers of darkness ( Darkstrom ).
